calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Continued To Aug-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hornsby for and with Dolores Milligan.

Mr. Hornsby reported that they confirmed two bank accounts, one at Bank of America and one at First National Bank, and a safe deposit box. In addition, Mr. Hornsby requested a 30 day extension of the Special Administration with the authority to drill the safe deposit stating that no key was found and that they were not able to open the box. The Court signed the order extending the Special Letters to August 10, 2009 with the authority to drill the box and thereafter open a new safe deposit box. The matter was also continued to August 10, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that Ms. Milligan needed to file a verified supplemental declaration which is to provide the Court with details as to the anticipated liabilities of the Decedent and any claims against the estate, the discovered assets and if a will was found in the safe deposit box. The Court also informed Counsel and Ms. Milligan that a minimum bond in the amount of $10,000.00 was required as Ms. Milligan was a nonresident of California.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
